sectionChild7ArrayList.sc7ContentDetail:
Biodegradable polymeric nanofibrous matrices containing gelatin were fabricated by simple electrospinning method. The electrospun poly(3-hydroxybutyrate-co-3-hydroxyvalerate)(PHBV)/gelatin (1:1) nanofiber structure revealed randomly aligned fibers with average diameter of 600 nm determined and calculated by SEM and image analyzer.
ATR-FTIR and ESCA mesurement were used to confirm the presence of gelatin in PHBV/gelatin nanofibers.
